test.query: SELECT groupUniqArray(number % 64) FROM numbers(50000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT groupUniqArray(number % 4096) FROM numbers(30000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT groupUniqArray(number % 262144) FROM numbers(30000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT groupUniqArray(toUInt8(number % 200)) FROM numbers(50000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT groupUniqArray(toFloat64(number % 64)) FROM numbers(50000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT groupUniqArray(toString(number % 4096)) FROM numbers(5000000) FORMAT Null
